title: JTM TNT
description: Our Channel (JTM Bedwars) has gained alot of views and subs through Videos where we test TNT Mods, so we made our own TNT Mod
body:
Our Channel (JTM Bedwars) has gained alot of views and subs through Videos where we test TNT Mods, so we made our own TNT Mod!

The Mod is Clientside and Serverside and only for Forge 1.20.1
It adds a new simple TNT to the Game that creates a bigger explosion than normal TNT and spawns lightning.
The TNT can only be obtained through Creative Mode or /give and can only be lit by Redstone or Explosions
